nasb.text: With shaking and rage he races over the ground, And he does not stand still at the voice of the trumpet.

esv.text: With fierceness and rage he swallows the ground; he cannot stand still at the sound of the trumpet.

cnv.text: 牠震抖激動，馳騁大地， 一聽見角聲，就不能站定。

ccb.text: 角声一响，它便无法静立， 狂烈地颤抖，急于驰骋大地。
